context: Gateway Plane detail for the seven-plane operating system. Covers ingress, authentication, notification routing, message normalization, and conversation gateway behavior.

sections.content: Gateway Plane owns ingress, authentication, notification routing, message normalization, and conversation gateway behavior. Gateway Plane translates external input into controlled internal requests.
Must_not = scheduling truth or business-domain decisions. Current posture = required-unassigned. openclaw is bridge-oriented candidate for gateway-facing interaction seams.

changelog.delta: Initial seven-plane pilot module for Gateway Plane.
